name: TOA Oil Co., Ltd.
summary: TOA Oil Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in petroleum refining and power generation business in Japan. The company offers various oil products, such as gasoline, kerosene, diesel oil and heavy oil. The company was formerly known as Nippon Jyuyu Co., Ltd. and changed its name to TOA Oil Co., Ltd. in April 1942. The company was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Kawasaki, Japan. TOA Oil Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Showa Shell Sekiyu K.K.
